beam_selection.label: Beam Selection
beam_selection.description: Controls which GEDI beams are processed.

beams.description: Which GEDI beams to process. GEDI has 8 beams (not contiguously numbered).

beam.description: Alias for beams. Both 'beam' and 'beams' are accepted with identical behavior.

quality_filtering.label: Quality & Degradation Filters
quality_filtering.description: Controls for GEDI data quality and instrument degradation filtering. Each filter has a flag (threshold) and a boolean to enable filtering.

l4_quality_flag.description: L4A quality flag threshold. Footprints with quality below this value are candidates for exclusion.

l4_quality_filter.description: Enable filtering by l4_quality_flag. When true, footprints below the threshold are excluded.
l4_quality_filter.note: Quality filters can be aggressive — enabling all filters may remove 50%+ of footprints.

l2_quality_flag.description: L2-level waveform processing quality flag threshold.

degrade_flag.description: Instrument degradation flag threshold. GEDI laser power has degraded over the mission.

degrade_filter.description: Enable filtering by degrade_flag. Excludes footprints from degraded instrument periods.

surface_filter.description: Enable filtering by surface_flag. Restricts to footprints with valid surface conditions.

granule_selection.label: Granule Filtering
granule_selection.description: Constrain which GEDI granules are processed.

granule.description: Filter granules by orbital parameters. All fields default to -1 (no filter).

field_selectors.label: Ancillary Field Selection
field_selectors.description: Request additional columns from the source GEDI granules.

anc_fields.description: Additional ancillary fields to include from the GEDI granules.
